# SecurePDF

> Free, browser-based PDF password protection with AES-256 encryption. Files never leave your device — all processing happens locally in your browser.

SecurePDF lets anyone add strong password protection to PDF documents without uploading them to a server. It uses the Web Crypto API and pdf-lib to encrypt files entirely client-side, so contents remain private.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Password-protect PDFs in your browser with AES-256 encryption.
- [Pricing](/pricing): Free, Starter, Pro and Lifetime plans.
- [About](/about): How SecurePDF works and our privacy-first approach.
- [Trust & Security](/trust-security): Security model, GDPR compliance, DSAR requests.
- [Contact](/contact): Support and business enquiries.
